description: Generates a plane mesh that is curved vertically. A picture in this page of it can be seen.

fields.Size: How big the curve plane mesh is, mostly a ratio
fields.Curvature: How much to bend the curve plane mesh by
fields.TiltAngle: How much to "rotate" the curve plane mesh length wise.
fields.AspectRatioCompensation: How to compensate for stretching due to curving the plane mesh backwards.
fields.UVScale: The inverse of the size the material should appear on the surface as.
fields.UVOffset: Shift the visual detail of the material around.
fields.Segments: How many bends/angles the plane should have in it's curve

usage: Attach to a slot and insert into a MeshRenderer to see the geometry. don't forget to use a Material.
